title: After the Satsuki Sho: First, We Eat

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And coming in first, it's... Matikanetannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?! I won?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: No way! Matikanetannhauser won?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon was impressive out there too,
but you never really know what'll happen once
those gates burst open!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: D-d-did I really do it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Defeat...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A collective groan runs through all the fans who
had pinned their hopes on Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Woo! I guess that's step one on the way to
becoming Triple Crown champion done and
dusted!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I need to keep this momentum up for the
Japanese Der—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, is Bourbon... okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Failure to secure victory in the Satsuki Sho has
rendered the Triple Crown unattainable. The one
and only dream that I shared with Father is...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Oxygen levels declining below normal levels.
Cause unknown. Executing emergency deep
breathing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. The next race is the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Even if I'm defeated, I cannot stop running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon quickly leaves the racecourse.
Behind her, a small figure runs up, as if to chase
after her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...No, this isn't the time to worry.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't anywhere near good enough today! At
this rate... I'll never reach her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: At this rate... I'll never make anyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need to get stronger... Much, much stronger!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. It's normal to be happy when you
win and frustrated when you lose.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But did you see how quickly they both started
thinking of the next race?! What drive!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me! Congratulations on your
magnificent victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hyah! I m-mean, thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
If it's not too much trouble, could I get a
statement about your enthusiasm for the
Japanese Derby?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Enthusiasm! Right, um... enthuuusiasm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm, uh, gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huuuh. Let me just jot that down. "...gonna...
win..."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: ...Umm, is that all?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: Oh! Okay, I see! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehe! I'm gonna do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mood is a bit flat... but if she says she'll do
her best, I know that's what she'll do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Japanese Derby. Let's go get
another win!
